chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No. D-3008 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on Misc. No.13247 of 2025 (Urgency) 2. For orders on office objection No.1 to 5. 3. For orders on Misc. No.13248 of 2025 (Exemption) 4. For orders on Misc. No.13249 of 2025 (Stay) 5. For hearing of main case. 02.07.2025 Mr. Maroof Hussain Hashmi, Advocate for the Petitioner. --------------------- Through this Petition, the Petitioner is seeking quashment of FIR No.30 of 2025, registered under Sections 381, 506, 34 PPC, at Police Station Airport, Karachi. The case of the Petitioner is that, upon conclusion of the investigation, the Investigating Officer has submitted a report under Section 173 Cr.P.C., recommending disposal of the said FIR under 'C' Class. However, the learned Magistrate has not passed any order on the said report. We have heard the learned counsel for the Petitioner and perused the material available on record. Since the FIR has already been disposed of by the Investigation Officer under “C” Clause and Summary in such respect is pending before the concerned Magistrate, therefore, no case for indulgence is made out. Accordingly, this Petition, along with listed applications, is dismissed in limine. However, the Petitioner is at liberty to approach the concerned Magistrate for redressal of his grievance. JUDGE JUDGE Jamil
